'''Nothar''' was the fifth planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Nubus]] in the [[Nubus system]]. Located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it was a [[Water/Legends|frozen]] rock.

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
